steps.title: Identify the needed example
steps.content: The student wants an example of a dinosaur fossil specimen's nickname. A useful sentence must give a specific nickname and identify the specimen that has that nickname.

steps.title: Reject missing nicknames
steps.content: A discusses the Pentaceratops specimen but omits its nickname. B gives only a general statement about nicknames. C says a nickname exists but never states it. The effective sentence identifies Spike as the specimen's nickname. The answer is D.
